steps.title: Interpret the h-term
steps.content:
In the equation
$$22h+18c=1{,}164$$
$h$ is the number of hours worked at the regular job. Therefore, $22h$ is the amount earned from the regular job.

steps.title: Identify the hourly rate
steps.content: The coefficient of $h$ is $22$, so the mechanic earns $22$ dollars for each hour at her regular job. The answer is A.
